findings.summary: Hardcoded pre-fetch fallback stats have now drifted and been hand-bumped twice (TangleClaw 39K+->100K+ LoC, TangleBrain 7K+->9K+). Consider baking fallbacks at build time from the collector manifests so they stop rotting between manual refreshes. Recommend adding to .prawduct/backlog.md, not acting on it in this cycle.

.prawduct/artifacts/project-preferences.md is still an unfilled template, so the Goal-4 conventions check has nothing to enforce; the project's real conventions (vitest colocated tests, dark inline-style cards, useGitHubLatestRelease for versions) live only in session memory. Recommend adding a fill-in task to .prawduct/backlog.md.

summary: 0 blocking, 0 warnings, 2 notes. Test evidence current (42/42 at HEAD). Bundle is ready to proceed to /pr create.
